Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The user wants a detailed description of a loan approval process based on a provided DECLARE model. Name: Deductive Reasoning - NE

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Review DECLARE definitions response A occurs B after precedence A before B succession A before B and if A then B chainprecedence A immediately before B Confirming the strict definitions leads to temporal paradox

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
